race.comment: RHETORIC (2) returns from a spell of 11 weeks and is having his first run for a new yard. Three start maiden and all three in NSW in far richer grade. Has good speed and the blinkers added. Expected to go close. LUCKY MAN (6) lines up for the first time since July 31. Started the last campaign impressively when in the placings over 870m at Toowoomba. Placed 2/2 this trip and expected to feature fresh. SWEET ARMANI (9) produced a better run last start, beaten 3 lengths into fourth over 1100m at this track. Has her share of talent and is a top-three prospect. SHALAA STRIKE (5)  is a first starter out of Group 3 winning dam Punch On. Has had a lot of education in former yard in Victoria.  Watch market.
